alkylation reagent: by incubating with 40 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature for 1 h.
alkylation concentration: by incubating with 40 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature for 1 h.
cleavage agent: Trypsin (Full) was set as the enzyme, allowing for two maximum missed cleavages.
collision energy: normalized collision energy of 30% along with an automated gain control target of 10,000.
enrichment method: Anti-Flag resin was then used to pull down BZW2 and its binding partners...
fractionation method: Using biochemical fractionation, we isolated the cytosolic, MAM, ER, and mitochondrial fractions...
fragmentation method: data-dependent CID ion trap MS/MS scans for precursor peptides...
instrument: nanoLC-ESI-MS/MS analysis on UltiMate3000RSLCnano-Orbitrap Fusion system...
ionization type: The Orbitrap Fusion was operated in positive ion mode with spray voltage 1.7 kV.
labeling: we used a previously developed SILAC approach as it allows for more reliable identification of interacting proteins.
reduction reagent: denatured in 6 M urea, 10 mM DTT, and 50 mM Tris–HCl pH 8.0 at room temperature for 1 h.
reduction concentration: 10 mM DTT, and 50 mM Tris–HCl pH 8.0 at room temperature for 1 h.
